UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIAO, MEI SE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1755 O'FARRELL ST. #308, S.F. CA.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE APARTMENTS, L.L.C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIAO, MEI SE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON JAN. 22, 1997 $1,629.26 RENT, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $215.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,244.26, LEASE FORFEITED
